what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that associates an attachment identifier with a board-item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp.
standouts: The file is purely a typed pointer from an attachment to a board item.
It uses a board:// URI scheme for the target.
It records a precise UTC timestamp for when the attachment was added.
conventions: Follows a fixed schema: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added.
Represents external targets with a URI-style identifier.
concerns: No payload or content is present beyond the metadata.
The meaning and resolvability of 'board://item-f354940e' cannot be verified from this file alone.
There is no author or provenance source field.
notes: A timestamped channel attachment record that points to a specific board item in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: Was this attachment generated automatically or added manually?
Why is there no content or payload associated with the attachment?
purpose_vs_actual: The implied purpose—linking an attachment to a board item—matches the metadata fields; no explicit purpose statement is present in the file.
intention_signals: It appears to record that attachment att-2a7f1ec5 is associated with board item item-f354940e in the dragnet-development channel at a specific point in time.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI as a typed target for a channel attachment.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a board item, which a fused system would keep as a provenance edge.
summary_for_embedding: Channel attachment metadata record att-2a7f1ec5 in dragnet-development links to board item item-f354940e via type board_items with an added UTC timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: Record the association of a channel attachment with a specific board item for provenance or lookup.
